case_title: FRANCIS PANG VS. KEITH FROSCH et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT FROSCH, KEITH
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-14-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KEITH FROSCH'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. KEITH FROSCH HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK/JIROQUE; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
